title: ControlFrame
description: Engine -> capture-app control messages on the session WebSocket: envelope acknowledgement, pipeline errors, and backpressure status (D8). Every MomentEnvelope receives exactly one ack; errors and status frames may arrive any time.

moment_id.description: Set for ack and error; null for status frames.

ack.description: kind=ack: the envelope's fate at admission (NOT completion - completion is the SceneAudio/NarratedScene or an error frame).

error.description: kind=error: a pipeline failure for an accepted moment, so the app is never blind to downstream failures.

status.description: kind=status: backpressure signal. Apps suppress the gate while busy=true (D8).
